releaseNotes: v0.28.3 — Behind-the-scenes dep chain unblock; no customer-facing feature changes. The win32 5 → win32 6 transition that had been blocking four packages since the v0.22 audit is now resolved by adopting file_picker 12.0.0-beta.3 (third beta, narrow use in this app — the two folder pickers in Settings and a few CSV save dialogs). Riding the unblock: share_plus 10 → 13 (new SharePlus.instance.share API, deprecation-clean), flutter_secure_storage 9 → 10 (the legacy AndroidOptions encryptedSharedPreferences flag is gone — the new Custom Ciphers backend migrates existing data on first read), and package_info_plus 8 → 10. 549 tests passing.
